message:
refactor: remove 1700+ lines of dead/duplicate code

- numpy.zig: 1631→973 lines (-658) - comptime generators replace handlers
- module_functions.zig: 1129→902 lines (-227) - remove blank lines, unused code
- allocator_analyzer.zig: DELETED (869 lines) - merged into function_traits.zig
- generators.zig: 1328→903 lines (-425) - split into builtin_types/test_skip
- arithmetic.zig: 1130→1082 lines (-48) - remove duplicate FloorDiv/Mod

Total: ~1700 lines removed across codegen modules
